title: Bedrock Coordinates
description: Shows coordinates on the HUD in a style similar to Bedrock Edition.
body:
![Screenshot in-game of a player and their coordinates in the top corner of the screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23a174ff36f0ef351f68b3602af9674050ab00be.png)

**Bedrock Coordinates** is a simple mod for Fabric that displays your coordinates in the top left corner of your screen, just like in Minecraft Bedrock Edition.

You can toggle the visibility with F1, or disable it in the Accessibility Settings menu.

There is also a custom keybind that lets you switch between the player XYZ position and the block position shown in the F3 debug menu. You can change this in the keybind settings.

### Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

Fabric API must be installed for the mod to work.

### Translations
We are looking to add support for more languages.

If you would like to help translate the mod, please visit the GitHub and submit a translation there.
